thresholdSource: criticalLow 1.0 / criticalHigh 5.0: 'Alert levels: < 1.0 or > 5.0 mg/dL' (NIH Clinical Center lab alert list, tabulated in PMC9186275 — institutional tier, adopted per standing decision that published hospital lists clear the bar for a cited draft). plausibleHigh 20: above documented survivable hypermagnesemia 18.6 mg/dL (PMC6028801, no deaths). plausibleLow 0.5: conservative floor below symptomatic 0.6 mmol/L. Draft — not clinician-approved.
